mapper.insert: INSERT into code_model (id, group_id, model_name, model_content, model_text, model_type, create_id, create_time, last_update_id, last_update_time, tenant_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{groupId}, #{modelName}, #{modelContent}, #{modelText}, #{modelType}, #{createId}, #{createTime}, #{createId}, #{createTime}, #{tenantId})
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.model_name modelName, a.model_content modelContent, a.model_text modelText, a.model_type modelType FROM code_model a WHERE a.id = #{id}
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
